CON: Capsules remain immutable — never prune or overwrite.
No SCHEMA_V5 naming in new code.
CTX: Foundation phase complete. Scanner (tools/cairn_scanner.py) with all §4 methods plus update_index; schema (schemas/cairn_v1.json) with D_TASK, RSK severity, capsule-conditional, PROJ_EXT container; client (src/cairn_client.py) with commit/diff/prune/export/import; IPC server (src/cairn_server.py) stdlib-only; four project extensions (schemas/projects/); normative rehydration spec (specs/rehydration.md). 135 tests passing across 6 test modules.
OBJ: Exit the foundation phase and begin §11 deployments. First target: CODA integration.

RSK.desc: No §11 deployments yet — all validation is internal to the Cairn repo. First live deployment (CODA) will exercise edges that synthetic tests cannot.

tasks.obj: Ship `cairn init` command for seeding fresh project trees
Deploy Cairn into the CODA repo and seal its first snapshot
Seal CODA's first milestone as a capsule under its own CAP- sequence
Add auth token for cross-machine server use
Structured logging for the IPC server
